description_long: This object is a Philips electric shaver, featuring a sleek, ergonomic body with a predominantly blue and black color scheme. The top section houses three circular rotary shaving heads arranged in a triangular pattern, designed for close and comfortable facial grooming. The handle is contoured for a secure grip, with a power button and branding visible on the upper surface. The shaving head assembly is attached to the main body with a hinge, allowing it to pivot for better contact with the skin. The exterior appears to be made of durable plastic with some rubberized grip areas for comfort and control. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for personal grooming in urban environments.
description: A compact Philips electric shaver with three rotary heads, blue and black ergonomic body, and a pivoting shaving head for facial grooming.
description_view_0: Front view showing the contoured blue and black handle with the power button and branding visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ergonomic grip and the pivoted shaving head assembly, revealing the hinge mechanism.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the three circular rotary shaving heads arranged in a triangular pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's curvature and the open, pivoted shaving head.
